name: Cheddar Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before beginning.
2. Whisk the butter until fluffy in a medium mixing bowl using an electric mixer.
3. Add Worcestershire sauce, grated cheddar, Romano cheese, garlic powder, and paprika to the butter mixture.
4. Mix until well combined.
5. Spread the mixture onto bread slices (Rye, Sourdough, or regular French Bread).
6. Toast under the broiler until hot.
